inglisuri-1-varianti-2021.prompt_html: Some people think that it’s very hard to be a doctor nowadays. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-2-varianti-2021.prompt_html: Some people think that it’s very hard to be a teacher nowadays. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-3-varianti-2021.prompt_html: Some people think that online learning is very effective. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-1-varianti-2022.prompt_html: Some people think that only hard work makes a person successful in life. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-2-varianti-2022.prompt_html: Some people think that entertainment places, like cinemas and theatres, should be free for children. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-3-varianti-2022.prompt_html: Some people think that schools should regularly organise sports competitions. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-4-varianti-2022.prompt_html: Some people think that schools should regularly organise young scientists’ competitions. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-5-varianti-2022.prompt_html: Some people think that it is better to study alone than in a group. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-6-varianti-2022.prompt_html: Some people think that driving a car should be taught in every school. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-1-varianti-2023.prompt_html: Some people think that nowadays you can learn English from the internet, without a teacher. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-2-varianti-2023.prompt_html: Some people think that you can have a good school-leaving party without spending a lot of money. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-3-varianti-2023.prompt_html: Some people think that you can get a good education only in a foreign country. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-4-varianti-2023.prompt_html: Some people think that spending time with friends is as important as spending time on studying. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-5-varianti-2023.prompt_html: Some people think that teenagers should take care of the elderly people in their neighbourhood. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-1-varianti-2024.prompt_html: Many young people in Georgia decide to learn more than one foreign language nowadays. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-2-varianti-2024.prompt_html: Big cities need more parks and gardens. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-3-varianti-2024.prompt_html: Many young people decide to work while studying at university. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-4-varianti-2024.prompt_html: It is many young people’s dream to study abroad. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-5-varianti-2024.prompt_html: Every school should have a free meal for children. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-1-varianti-2025.prompt_html: Many people, including young ones, want to go abroad to find a job and have a good income. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-2-varianti-2025.prompt_html: Money is the most important thing in life. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-3-varianti-2025.prompt_html: After the age of 18, young people should be able to make important decisions independently. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-4-varianti-2025.prompt_html: Many young people nowadays make friends through internet sites and different applications. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-6-varianti-2023.prompt_html: Some people think that autumn is the best season of the year. Do you agree or disagree with this opinion? State your opinion and support it with reasons and examples.

inglisuri-6-varianti-2024.prompt_html: It is important that every person knows the history of his or her country. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.

inglisuri-5-varianti-2025.prompt_html: Public transport should be free for elderly people. What do YOU think about this? Give your own opinion and support it with arguments.
